books.title: The AI Wealth Code
books.subtitle: How 10,000+ Entrepreneurs Are Printing Digital Income with AI
books.description: Discover the exact AI systems and strategies used by the world's fastest-growing digital entrepreneurs. This comprehensive guide reveals how to build 5 automated income streams using AI tools—no coding required, no large investment needed. Includes step-by-step playbooks, templates, and real case studies.

books.title: Digital Empire Blueprint
books.subtitle: Build a 6-Figure Online Business from Scratch in 90 Days
books.description: The definitive roadmap for building a profitable digital product business from zero. Covers product creation, pricing psychology, launch strategy, funnel building, and scaling to ₹10L+ per month. Packed with frameworks, checklists, and real revenue screenshots.

books.title: The Prompt Millionaire
books.subtitle: 500+ ChatGPT & Claude Prompts That Turn Ideas Into Rupees
books.description: The most comprehensive prompt library for entrepreneurs. Includes 500+ battle-tested prompts for content creation, sales copy, email marketing, business planning, product development, and client acquisition. Each prompt includes variations, examples, and monetization strategies.

books.title: Zero to Creator
books.subtitle: Launch Your First Digital Product & Make Your First ₹1 Lakh Online
books.description: The beginner's bible for digital entrepreneurship. Step-by-step guide to creating your first ebook, online course, or digital template—and selling it profitably. Includes a 30-day action plan, Canva templates, email scripts, and a pre-launch checklist used by 5,000+ creators.

books.title: The No-Code Revolution
books.subtitle: Build Profitable Apps, Bots & Automations Without Writing a Line of Code
books.description: Unlock the power of no-code and AI automation tools to build real businesses. Covers Zapier, Make.com, Bubble, Notion, Webflow, and 20+ tools. Includes 15 real business blueprints you can launch this week, from SaaS clones to automated agencies—all without a developer.

audiobooks.title: The AI Wealth Code
audiobooks.subtitle: Audio Edition — Listen & Learn
audiobooks.description: The full AI Wealth Code experience in immersive audio. Narrated by a professional voice artist with music beds and chapter summaries. Perfect for your commute, workout, or morning routine.

audiobooks.title: Morning Mindset Millionaire
audiobooks.subtitle: The 5AM Routine That Builds 7-Figure Entrepreneurs
audiobooks.description: Exclusive audio experience. Start every morning with the exact mindset rituals, mental frameworks, and visualisation exercises used by successful entrepreneurs worldwide. 30 daily episodes, each under 10 minutes.

audiobooks.title: The Focused Founder
audiobooks.subtitle: Deep Work & Flow State Mastery for Entrepreneurs
audiobooks.description: Learn the neuroscience of peak performance and how to design your life for maximum output. Covers deep work protocols, distraction elimination, energy management, and how top founders produce a week's worth of work in 2 days.

audiobooks.title: Digital Empire Blueprint
audiobooks.subtitle: Audio Edition — Full Narration
audiobooks.description: The complete Digital Empire Blueprint in audio format. All 178 pages narrated with emphasis on actionable steps. Includes bonus audio-only interviews with 3 successful digital product entrepreneurs.

aiTools.title: AI Image Generator
aiTools.description: Generate stunning product covers, social media graphics, ebook mockups, and marketing visuals in seconds. Powered by FLUX.1 — the world's most advanced image model.

aiTools.title: AI Content Writer
aiTools.description: Write complete ebooks, blog posts, email sequences, sales pages, and social media content. Just enter a topic and get publish-ready content in minutes. 20+ templates included.

aiTools.title: AI Prompt Library
aiTools.description: Access 500+ curated prompts organised by use case — marketing, product creation, sales, customer support, and more. Each prompt is tested and optimised for maximum output quality.

aiTools.title: AI Business Planner
aiTools.description: Generate complete business plans, go-to-market strategies, competitive analysis reports, and financial projections for any business idea. Investor-ready output in under 5 minutes.

aiTools.title: AI Social Media Kit
aiTools.description: Automate your entire social media presence. Generate a month of content, captions, hashtag sets, and posting schedules tailored to your niche and audience in one click.

starter.name: Starter
starter.label: One-Time Payment
starter.description: Everything you need to start your digital journey
features: Lifetime Access — Pay Once, Keep Forever
